description: Create a content slide on humans and machines with a sidebar-left layout, showing the human-machine relationship touch points as two opposing bullet lists around a central visual.

header.headline: Interactions between humans and machines are multifaceted – Society's capacity to adapt and shape technological advances is fundamental
header.sub: The human-machine relationship at different touch points

items.sub: Technological progress is a driver of wealth, but also carries implications of social and economic inequality
Social media has changed our lives. Emergent technologies and new digital realms, such as the metaverse, point to further societal changes
Workplaces have undergone profound change, but the key question remains: Will robots complement humans – or substitute them?
Advances in biotechnology are changing society by eradicating fatal diseases. Ethical concerns arise regarding gene editing

center.body: Central illustrative visual representing the multifaceted interaction between humans and machines.
